synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-25729 Oracle Linux 9 sendmail bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25729
description:
[8.16.1-11.0.2]
- Fixes sendmail failure after reboot due to timeout [Orabug: 38580326]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25729

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-25729.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
sendmail-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm
sendmail-cf-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
sendmail-doc-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
sendmail-milter-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.i686.rpm
sendmail-milter-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm
sendmail-milter-devel-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.i686.rpm
sendmail-milter-devel-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
sendmail-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.aarch64.rpm
sendmail-cf-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
sendmail-doc-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
sendmail-milter-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.aarch64.rpm
sendmail-milter-devel-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/sendmail-8.16.1-11.0.2.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[8.16.1-11.0.2]
- Fixes sendmail failure after reboot due to timeout [Orabug: 38580326]
